articles.title: Israeli strikes on Iran mark new escalation in Middle East tension
articles.summary: Israeli forces launched a wide‑scale wave of attacks on Iranian targets early today, with air raid sirens reported in Tel Aviv and clashes intensifying across the region.

articles.title: Energy supply concerns grow as Strait of Hormuz tensions escalate
articles.summary: Disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz have fueled fears of global oil supply instability, prompting discussions for large reserve releases among international energy agencies.

articles.title: Technical challenges slow France’s rollout of EU border system
articles.summary: France faces delays implementing a new EU entry‑exit system, raising concerns among dual citizens and expatriates over residency and travel documentation procedures.

articles.title: India advances renewable projects and education reforms
articles.summary: National efforts in India focus on renewable energy expansion and educational reforms, including approval of additional medical training seats and digital literacy programs.

articles.title: US stock markets show mixed performance amid global tensions
articles.summary: Amid geopolitical uncertainty and energy price fluctuations, US indexes saw varied results today, with investors closely watching inflation data and international developments.
